summary:
• Engineer passionate about data-driven value creation, quantitative analysis, and technological innovation.
• Solid experience in applied mathematics, data science, and developing tools for decision-making.
• Curious, rigorous, and results-oriented, I enjoy collaborating within multidisciplinary teams to solve complex problems and deliver value across diverse environments.
skills:
• Demonstrated teamwork, interdisciplinary collaboration, leadership, and science mediation
• Communicated effectively, provided customer service orientation, managed projects, organized tasks, and managed time efficiently
• Applied analytical thinking, solved problems, demonstrated creativity, showed scientific curiosity, adapted to new situations, worked autonomously, maintained rigor, and took initiative
• Developed in Python, C++, Scala, SQL, LaTeX; automated with shell scripting; versioned with Git/GitHub
• Built APIs and apps with FastAPI, Streamlit, Node.js/Express, React; developed web solutions; containerized with Docker and Docker Compose
• Applied machine learning, performed data analysis, used statistics, built mathematical models, ran simulations, optimized portfolios, visualized data, and leveraged Power BI
• Designed REST APIs, integrated Pybind11, implemented Elasticsearch and MongoDB, monitored with Prometheus/Grafana, automated CI/CD (GitHub Actions), managed PostgreSQL, used SBT/Scala, developed smart contracts (Solidity, Web3.js)
experience:
•  Data Analyst - NaTran (Bois-Colombes), 2023-09 – 2026-09. OPENDATA ODRE data analysis for transparency and operational value creation.
•  Data Analyst - International Mobility - NaTran Deutschland (Berlin), 2025-05-01 – 2025-08-31-present. Analysis of European gas flows (ENTSOG), Power BI reports, collaborative tools.
•  Banking Advisor - HSBC Louvre Branch (Paris), 2023-07 – 2023-08. Customer service, daily operations management and business development.
•  Preparatory Class Student - Lycée Claude Bernard (France), 2022-2023. TIPE on the detection of drinking water leaks using an acoustic sensor (SePem300).
•  Sales Assistant - HSBC Louvre Branch (Paris), 2022-08-01 – 2022-08-31. Temporary assignment focused on customer relations in a bank branch.
•  Preparatory Class Student - Lycée Fénelon (Paris), 2020-2021. TIPE on the use of ultrasonic waves to fragment a kidney stone.
•  HYPPOCAMPE Intern / Science Facilitator - IREM Aix Marseille University (Marseille), 2019-12. Research on programmable automaton and facilitation of a mathematics booth.
•  Senior Year Science Student - Lycée Polyvalent Val de Durance (Pertuis), 2019-2020. Science track with strong focus on mathematics and physical sciences.
education:
•  Master of Engineering (Applied Mathematics, Finance and Technology) - CY Tech (ex EISTI) (Cergy, France), 2023 - 2026. Engineering program focused on applied mathematics, data, computer science and finance, with progressive specialization in computational finance and financial information systems.
•  Preparatory Class (CPGE) - Lycée Claude Bernard (France), 2022 - 2023. TIPE on the detection of drinking water leaks using an acoustic sensor (SePem300).
•  Preparatory Class (CPGE) - Lycée Fénelon (Paris) (Paris, France), 2020 - 2021. TIPE on the use of ultrasonic waves to fragment a kidney stone.
•  Scientific Baccalaureate (Science Track) - Lycée Polyvalent Val de Durance (Pertuis, France), 2019 - 2020. General scientific education with a strong foundation in mathematics and physical sciences.
certifications: Microsoft Data Analyst (in progress), BMC (in progress), AMF (in progress)
projects:
• - Automatic music genre classification (Python, SQL, collaborative management GitHub/Trello, collective report).
• - Developed a FastAPI API and Streamlit app for auto insurance premium prediction using ML models (frequency, severity).
• - Developed a decentralized betting platform (React, Node.js, Solidity, Docker, nginx).
• - Developed a Python platform for automated CV and cover letter generation from structured job offers (LaTeX, FastAPI, Streamlit, Docker).
• - Developed C++ pricing engines for energy derivatives (Spark/Crack/Forwards), Python bindings, benchmarks.
• - Developed a C++20 quantitative finance engine (Black-Scholes, Monte Carlo, VaR, benchmarks, pybind11).
• - Designed a real-time recommendation and search system (<100ms) inspired by Steam, with FastAPI, search, and observability (Prometheus, Grafana).
• - Web portfolio optimization demo (Streamlit), Grafana/Prometheus monitoring, Docker Compose orchestration.
• - Developed C++ modules for mathematics, statistics, and optimization (random number generation, normal distribution, time series, optimization functions).
• - Scala SBT project: distributed data analysis with Spark, dependency management, advanced logging, development in IntelliJ.

interests: Hiking, classical music, leisure cycling, leisure football
